Independent Cartel of Acapulco.description: The Independent Cartel of Acapulco was a Mexican criminal gang based in Acapulco, Guerrero, formed in 2010 as a split from the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel after the death of Arturo Beltrán Leyva. It engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, and murder, known for flaying victims' faces. The group was severely damaged by 2011 and faded from public view, with its territory taken over by rival La Barredora.

Almighty Vice Lord Nation.description: The Almighty Vice Lord Nation is the second-largest street and prison gang in Chicago, Illinois, founded in 1957 by African American youths in the North Lawndale neighborhood. It is a founding member of the People Nation alliance and engages in drug sales, robbery, extortion, and murder. The gang attempted to soften its image in the 1960s as the Conservative Vice Lords but continued criminal activities. It remains active with an estimated 30,000–35,000 members.

descriptions: The Vice Lords emerged from the 14th Street Clovers.
edges.evidence_quote: the 14th Street Clovers were the gang that later became the Vice Lords in the late 1950s.

Cornbread Mafia.description: The Cornbread Mafia was a group of Kentucky men who operated the largest domestic marijuana production operation in U.S. history, based in central Kentucky. Founded in the late 1970s by Joe Keith Bickett and others, the group grew marijuana across 30 farms in 10 states. The term was first publicly used by federal prosecutors in 1989 after a massive bust. The group was known for its code of silence, which prevented a Continuing Criminal Enterprise prosecution.

descriptions: The Red Scorpions (led by Jamie Bacon) exterminated the Lal gang in the Surrey Six massacre.
edges.evidence_quote: The newly founded Lal gang had been 'exterminated' in its entirety with the Surrey Six massacre.

Clan Licciardi.description: The Clan Licciardi is a powerful Camorra syndicate based in the Secondigliano district of Naples, Italy. Founded in the mid-1980s by Gennaro Licciardi, it transformed the area into a strategic hub for drug storage and trafficking. After Gennaro's death, leadership passed to his siblings, notably Maria Licciardi. The clan is part of the Alleanza di Secondigliano cartel and has been involved in internal conflicts and large-scale drug trafficking.

descriptions: Clan Alfieri was in conflict with the Licciardi clan over territory.
edges.evidence_quote: conflitti e contrasti ... i Licciardi (d'intralcio alle mire sulla zona occidentale di Napoli)

descriptions: Licciardi clan is one of the clans holding real power within the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: According to Misso, the real power of the organization is now in the hands of the Licciardi clan, Mallardo clan, Moccia clan and Contini clan.

The Base.description: The Base is an international neo-Nazi organization and paramilitary training network formed in 2018 by Rinaldo Nazzaro. It advocates accelerationist and white nationalist ideology, aiming to establish white ethnostates through terrorism and violent overthrow of governments. The group operates training camps and has links to other far-right extremist groups. It is designated as a terrorist organization in several countries.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Aryan Renaissance Society (prison), Azov Battalion, Active Club Network, Combat 18, Nordic Resistance Movement, Order of Nine Angles, Russian Imperial Movement, Rusich Group, The Base

Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi.description: The Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi is a yakuza organization based in Hyogo, Japan, formed in 2015 after breaking away from the Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi. It was founded by Kunio Inoue and initially had 2,800 members, but membership declined to around 140 by 2023 due to splits and disbandments. The group has been designated as a crime syndicate by authorities and is involved in various criminal activities.

edges.evidence_quote: They broke away from The Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi in 2015

descriptions: Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi is a splinter group that split from Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi split off from Yamaguchi-gumi in August 2015

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi was a constituent group within Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi yakuza organization included Kobe -based Yamaken-gumi

descriptions: Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi members attacked Oda-gumi by crashing a car into its offices.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Yamaken faction, Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi, deliberately crashed a car into Oda-gumi's offices in March 2016.

descriptions: Takumi-gumi was a founding member of Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi, a splinter group, and later left it.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2015, the Takumi-gumi, along with other yakuza organisations, withdrew from the Yamaguchi-gumi to form the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi , which withdrew from the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi in 2022.

descriptions: Yamaguchi-gumi and Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi are in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: These Yamaguchi-gumi and the three organizations that split from them are fighting each other.

descriptions: Yamaguchi-gumi was in conflict with Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi after the split.
edges.evidence_quote: the Yamaguchi-gumi informed the Hyogo Prefectural Police of its intention to end its conflict with organizations such as the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi formed by defectors from 6th Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: he left the sixth-generation Yamaguchi-gumi and formed a new organization, the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi was a founding member and later under the umbrella of Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi from 2015 to 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2015, the Yamaken-gumi, along with several other organisations, withdrew from the Yamaguchi-gumi and formed the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi . From 2015 to 2020, it was under the umbrella of the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi.

descriptions: Cosa Nostra clans Agate and Guttadauro allied with 'Ndrangheta clans Marando and Trimboli for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2003 con l'operazione Igres si scopre un'alleanza per il traffico internazionale di droga tra i Marando e i Trimboli di Platì e Volpiano, dall'altra i fratelli Agate di Mazara del Vallo e i Guttadauro di Bagheria.

descriptions: The Vitelli were part of the Perna faction.
edges.evidence_quote: da un lato i Perna-Pranno-Vitelli

descriptions: The Varacalli were part of the Polifroni-Franco-Varacalli-Spagnolo coalition fighting against the Barillaro-Romano-Zucco coalition in the Faida di Ciminà.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida ha visto contrapposte da una parte le famiglie dei Barillaro-Romano-Zucco e dall'altra i Polifroni-Franco-Varacalli-Spagnolo.
